title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Chiffon, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hulluh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I must be mistaken, but...

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Chiffon and Lola's father

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That looks like my daughter,

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: Chiffon!

dialogue.speaker: Chiffon
dialogue.text: That's right! Lola was

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The chocolate minister of cacao Island! Ever since she's been gone, that minister seat has been vacant!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And despite the fact that everyone would let you take it, you've continuously refused that post!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: B... but! to me,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only fitting choco- late minister of Chocolatown

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is sister Lola! I always hoped she'd one day come home, and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So Lola back from Thriller bark was a famous chocolatier, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's all well and good, pudding, but can you get out of there already?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahahahahaha! If I sit on the same carpet as that man while wearing this wedding dress,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: People will think we're some sort of couple or some- thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who will?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's Annoying! AHAHAHA! A- A... Annoying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry for being annoying, but promise me you won't fall, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kyaaaah! How nice is he?! He's always worried about me!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: S- shut up, dummy! I get to decide whether or not I fall, okay, Sanji?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pudding! Whatever. We'll be at cacao Island soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Okay! Let's make this thing quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...my dear:)

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyahaha! It's useless! Accept the loss, straw hat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Kata- Kuri is the strongest of the three commanders!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You aren't getting back to that ship! You aren't even get- ting out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hawk GATLING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Fufu... not quite right, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is way more efficient!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: UWAAAAAA AAA! AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GyaAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Lord Kata- Kuri, that's not fair!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 33 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
